Curated for builders, operators, and curious teams. [...] ## About Loova Ads Studio

Loova Ads Studio is an innovative AI-powered platform designed to streamline the creation of high-converting advertising content. It caters to brands and marketing agencies seeking to produce engaging UGC videos, product commercials, avatar videos, and static creatives without the need for extensive video production skills. What sets Loova apart is its focus on performance-driven ads; it emphasizes not just aesthetic appeal but also effectiveness, helping users craft ads that drive conversions at a remarkably low cost—under $2 per ad. The platform's all-in-one approach simplifies the creative process, enabling rapid deployment of tailored ad assets suitable for social media, e-commerce, and digital marketing campaigns.

## What Is Viral Ad Clone Maker?

Viral Ad Clone Generator is an AI tool that turns a proven ad structure into a new ad for your brand. Upload a viral ad, and AI analyzes elements like the hook, pacing, scenes, and CTA. Loova decodes successful advertising formulas, reimagines them for your brand, and crafts authentic, high-converting ad creatives tailored to your business.

Viral Ad Clone is part of Loova Ads Studio, a creation space for building marketing visuals and videos. After cloning a viral ad structure, you can continue creating product ads, UGC-style videos, avatar ads, image creatives, and more campaign assets using AI Ad Generator.

results.title: Loova AI: Your AI Creative Studio
results.content:
That frustration is what led us to build Loova Agents.

We wanted to create something that behaves more like a creative director than just another AI generator.   
With Loova Agents, the goal is simple:

understand the intent behind your idea

plan scenes before generation

generate visuals and BGM together

keep the whole project inside one infinite canvas

let creators shape stories visually, not tab by tab

People are already using it for product ads, AI short films, talking avatar videos, UGC style content, and more.

We’re still very early. Still learning every day. Still building with the community.

If you try it, I’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts. A lot of what we build next will come directly from user feedback. Here is a quick link to explore: 

SomitraSR from Timidlly [...] Anbang Xu
Loova AI

Loova AI

@abod\_rehman You can use the videos across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, ads, landing pages, ecommerce stores, client work, and pretty much anywhere else.  
  
Not locked at all. We support exporting videos in standard formats, and we’re also building more editing/export flexibility so creators can continue workflows in tools they already use if they want.

Loova AI

@abod\_rehman It’s not locked into Loova.

You can export the final video and use it wherever you need — social posts, ads, landing pages, client work, or your own editing workflow.

We want Loova to fit into creators’ existing workflows, not trap the work inside our product.

Nova [...] Anbang Xu

@rockzhang Yes, that’s exactly what we’re building. The goal is for the agent to act like a director and marketing expert, helping you turn a rough idea into a high-quality video quickly and easily.

Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang That’s exactly what we want to make easier.

You shouldn’t need to know how to write a script, plan shots, or choose the right tools. With Loova, you can start from a rough creative goal, and the agent will turn it into a story structure, scenes, visuals, and a video workflow automatically.

You can still jump in and adjust things, but the heavy lifting should be handled by the agent.
